name: GIGABYTE B760M GAMING X AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760M GAMING X AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support and Wi-Fi 6E.
